$comment: THE OPERATOR'S CONFIG. Clone-and-own: edit this, run `pnpm build:app`, host app-inlined/ on any static host, and apply app-inlined/csp-headers.txt. There is no server to configure — no issuer, no signing key, no client registration, no store. See README.md.
$comment_rpId: PIN IT. K = HKDF(PRF(credential, rpId)) — the passkey PRF scoped to this rpId IS the wallet key. Never infer it from a hostname: an origin on auth.example.com with rpId example.com would derive a DIFFERENT WALLET. The build refuses to proceed without it.
$comment_optional: Everything below is optional passthrough for the popup.
